title: GOPPUS 750ml/26oz Stainless Water Bottle with Straw Double Wall Insulated Bottles with Strap Reusable Vacuum Thermal Flask Leakproof Keep Cold Drinks Bottles with Flip Top Lid for Men Women BPA Free
features: 【Satisfaction Guarantee】-GOPPUS providing 1 year Satisfaction Guarantee. If you don't know how to contact us, please see the video in the image.

【Unbreakable Material】The GOPPUS Stainless Steel Flask made by rust-resistant 304 food-grade stainless steel(18/8 Stainless Steel) inside and out, maintaining the taste and purity of your favorite drinks.
【Friendly Design】The Lids With Built-in Carry Strap and Leakproof, so taking these travel bottles on the go is easy and mess-free—no water rings or slippery hands
【Environment Friendly】Our GOPPUS Sports Flask is reusable and long-lasting. So you are actively reducing the waste of disposable bottles. Both Good for your wallet and nature.
【Vacuum Insulated Water Bottle】Double wall insulation makes it sweat-free! Maintains temperature and keeps drinks cold for up to 12 hours and hot for up to 24 hours.
